name: Taco Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15-oz.) pinto beans in chili sauce, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook and stir ground beef and onion over medium heat until meat is browned; drain off fat.
2. Stir in soup, corn, beans (undrained), undrained tomatoes, seasoning mix, and water.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
4. Simmer uncovered about 45 minutes or to desired consistency.
5. Serve with tortilla chips and cheese. Makes 6 servings.
